definition: designed geometrical orientation of the packed object by the manufacturer during transportation or storage

definition_ml.en: designed geometrical orientation of the packed object by the manufacturer during transportation or storage
definition_ml.de: vom Hersteller angegebene geometrische Ausrichtung des verpackten Objekts während des Transports oder der Lagerung

note: The orientation during transport or storage of an object is normally indicated outside at the package by grafical symbols

note_ml.en: The orientation during transport or storage of an object is normally indicated outside at the package by grafical symbols
note_ml.de: Die Ausrichtung während des Transports oder der Lagerung eines Objekts ist normalerweise auf der Außenseite der Verpackung durch graphische Symbole angegeben.
